metadata.description: CDISC SDTM Controlled Terminology for clinical trials

codelists.name: Sex
codelists.definition: The biological sex of an individual.

terms.definition: A person who belongs to the sex that normally produces ova.
A person who belongs to the sex that normally produces sperm.
Not known, not observed, not recorded, or refused.
Sex could not be determined; not clear which sex.

codelists.name: Race
codelists.definition: A categorization of humans based on selected genetically transmitted physical characteristics.

terms.definition: A person having origins in any of the original peoples of North and South America.
A person having origins in any of the original peoples of the Far East, Southeast Asia, or the Indian subcontinent.
A person having origins in any of the Black racial groups of Africa.

terms.submission_value: NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER
terms.preferred_term: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
terms.definition: A person having origins in any of the original peoples of Hawaii, Guam, Samoa, or other Pacific Islands.
A person having origins in any of the original peoples of Europe, the Middle East, or North Africa.
Not known, not observed, not recorded, or refused.
Having more than one race.
Different from the one(s) specified.

codelists.name: Ethnicity
codelists.definition: The ethnic group of an individual based on cultural traditions.

terms.definition: A person of Cuban, Mexican, Puerto Rican, South or Central American, or other Spanish culture or origin.
A person not of Cuban, Mexican, Puerto Rican, South or Central American, or other Spanish culture or origin.
Not known, not observed, not recorded, or refused.
Not provided or available.

codelists.name: Country
codelists.definition: A set of countries using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes.

codelists.name: Outcome of Adverse Event
codelists.definition: The final result or outcome of the adverse event.

terms.definition: The adverse event has completely resolved.
The adverse event is in the process of resolving.
The adverse event has not resolved.
The adverse event resolved but with residual effects.
The adverse event resulted in death.
The outcome is not known.

codelists.name: Action Taken with Study Treatment
codelists.definition: The action taken with the study treatment as a result of the adverse event.

terms.definition: The study drug was permanently discontinued.
The dose of the study drug was reduced.
The dose of the study drug was increased.
The dose of the study drug was not changed.
The study drug was temporarily interrupted.
Not applicable for this adverse event.
The action taken is not known.

codelists.name: Severity/Intensity Scale for Adverse Events
codelists.definition: The severity or intensity of the adverse event.

terms.definition: Awareness of symptoms but easily tolerated.
Discomfort enough to cause interference with usual activity.
Incapacitating with inability to work or do usual activity.

codelists.name: NCI CTCAE Grade Scale for Adverse Events
codelists.definition: NCI Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events (CTCAE) grading scale.

terms.definition: Mild; asymptomatic or mild symptoms; clinical or diagnostic observations only; intervention not indicated.
Moderate; minimal, local or noninvasive intervention indicated; limiting age-appropriate instrumental ADL.
Severe or medically significant but not immediately life-threatening; hospitalization or prolongation of hospitalization indicated.
Life-threatening consequences; urgent intervention indicated.
Death related to adverse event.

codelists.name: Serious Event
codelists.definition: Indicates whether the adverse event is serious.

terms.definition: The adverse event is serious per regulatory definition.
The adverse event is not serious.

codelists.name: Causality
codelists.definition: The relationship between the adverse event and the study treatment.

terms.definition: The adverse event is related to the study treatment.
The adverse event is not related to the study treatment.
The adverse event may be related to the study treatment.
The adverse event is probably related to the study treatment.
The adverse event is unlikely to be related to the study treatment.

codelists.name: Route of Administration
codelists.definition: The route of administration of a treatment.

codelists.name: No Yes Response
codelists.definition: A response indicating yes or no.
